name: Seros
bio:
Ancient Statue turned Gargoyle, Night Dragon. He explores his identity in the Vampire Castle and fights with poison and flying power.

Role: Debuff Silence
Intro: A Physical Control hero that can reduce enemies' Accuracy and silence frontline enemies.

skillSlots.name: Fist of Beast
skillSlots.description: Deals 140% P.DMG to random enemy target and reduces target's Effect Hit Rate by 15% for 2 turns.

skillSlots.name: Ironfisted Maul
skillSlots.description: Attacks frontline enemy targets for 122% P.DMG with 50% probability to inflict <color=#FFEB04>[Silence]</color>.
